query:
SELECT
    split_part(asset_name, '/', array_length(string_to_array(asset_name, '/'), 1)) AS "name!",
    asset_name AS "path!",
    node_type::text AS "node_type!"
FROM asset_to_bundle_mappings
WHERE version_id = $1 AND node_type IN ('file', 'both') AND asset_name ILIKE $2
ORDER BY asset_name
LIMIT 200
